steps.title: Use the food-web clue
steps.content: The second sentence says that decreased MPB abundance has a direct negative impact on coastal food webs. If losing MPB directly damages the ecosystem, MPB must be necessary to that ecosystem.

steps.title: Reject weaker relationships
steps.content: B means symbolically representative, but the passage describes real ecological impact. C means lower in rank, and D means replaceable; both conflict with the idea that losing MPB harms food webs. The needed phrase means essential to. The answer is A.
